data.title: CamoAg™ Launches New iPhone® App with CarPlay®, Advancing Agribusiness Information Access for Field Teams
data.description: A GTM platform provider for agribusiness sales and marketing teams, CamoAg Inc., has revealed new subscription tiers designed to cater to the varying needs of professionals in the agricultural sector. The announcement was made in Chicago on April 7, 2026. The company also introduced an updated iPhone application as part of its offerings.

data.title: Best Presentation Tools for Business (2026): Prezi Recognized as a Leading AI Presentation Maker by Better Business Advice
data.description: In the latest rankings by Better Business Advice on the top presentation tools for businesses in 2026, Prezi has emerged as a standout AI presentation maker. The platform's swift creation process, vibrant visual results, high level of user contentment, and unique features have contributed to its recognition. This acknowledgment further solidifies Prezi's position as a frontrunner in the industry.

data.title: Delisting of Exchange Traded Products
data.description: Nordea Bank Abp ("Nordea") is initiating the delisting of jointly issued instruments on April 14, 2026, following the termination of the partnership with Nordnet AB. This includes certificates and mini futures issued between May 2, 2017, and December 5, 2025, under instrument names containing “Nordnet.” The affected instruments are specified in the "Delisting Schedule" appendix. The delisting procedure will span from April 14 to April 27, 2026.

data.title: Latino Community Foundation Exceeds $50M in All-time Grantmaking to More Than 550 Power-building Nonprofit Organizations Serving Latino Communities
data.description: In San Francisco, the Latino Community Foundation (LCF) has revealed that its grantmaking total has exceeded $50 million since 2018, a significant achievement in its efforts to empower Latino civic and economic influence. This announcement coincides with LCF's initial quarter of 2026 grant allocations, introducing its first national fund and maintaining support for various communities in California and southwestern states. data.title: Sun Pacific Unlocks New Insights Through NIQ Collaboration
data.description: NielsenIQ (NYSE: NIQ), a top consumer intelligence firm, has partnered with Sun Pacific, a renowned California producer of fresh fruit, to enhance their market presence and drive growth. Sun Pacific, known for popular brands like Cuties® Mandarins and Mighties® Kiwi, will utilize NIQ's retail measurement and analytics expertise to achieve these goals. The collaboration aims to boost Sun Pacific's expansion in the produce department through data-driven strategies. This agreement signifies a significant step towards accelerating Sun Pacific's growth trajectory, as NIQ provides valuable insights and analytics to support their efforts.

data.title: Linde Announces First Quarter 2026 Earnings and Conference Call Schedule
data.description: Linde (Nasdaq: LIN) is set to announce its first quarter 2026 financial results at 06:00 EDT/midday CEST on May 1, 2026. The Company will conduct a conference call at 09:00 EDT/15:00 CEST on the same day, available to the public and media in listen-only mode. Those interested can join the live conference call via the US Toll-Free Dial-In Number: 1 888 770 7292 or the UK Toll-Free Dial-In Number: 0800 358 0970, using the access code: 6877110. The event will also be webcast live for listening only at https://www.linde.com/investor.

data.title: DRINKS Survey Finds $40B Gap Between How Consumers Discover Alcohol and How They Can Buy It, as Demand for Embedded Commerce and AI Recommendations Surges
data.description: In Los Angeles, DRINKS, a prominent AI-powered SaaS platform catering to the $285 billion U.S. alcohol industry, unveiled insights from its recent nationwide consumer study. The key takeaway highlighted the evolution of social media as a direct influencer of alcohol purchases, with 63% of individuals aged 21 to 34 indicating they bought alcohol due to social media content. This represents a notable increase from earlier figures, where 49 to 55% identified social media as a primary discovery platform in March 2025. The data reflects the shifting landscape where social media is not just a discovery tool but a significant driver of purchasing decisions in the alcohol sector.

data.title: Felix Raises $1.7M to Build Hyperautomation for Professional Services
data.description: Felix, an AI workflow platform (felix.so) based in Prague, has secured $1.7 million in pre-seed funding. XYZ Venture Capital led the funding round, with contributions from angel investors who are current or former top executives and founders at prominent companies like Amazon, Apple, Palantir, FlexPort, Yelp, and Midjourney. The platform, which is tailored to manage intricate professional services operations autonomously, is currently operational in leading legal, finance, and insurance enterprises. The company intends to utilize the investment to enhance its product offerings.

data.title: JELL-O Introduces the JELL-OMETER: the World's First-Ever Device to Quantifiably Measure Fan Intensity
data.description: Today, JELL-O has unveiled the JELL-OMETER, an innovative device that converts crowd noise, movement, and enthusiasm into real-time JELL-O Jiggles (Js), serving as the official metric for gauging the enthusiasm of sports fans. This unprecedented tool measures the intensity of cheering fans in stadiums worldwide, with some gatherings causing notable seismic activity. The age-old debates surrounding the loudest crowds and most spirited fandoms are now quantifiable through this groundbreaking technology.

data.title: 20 Abstracts at AACR Highlight Scale, Innovation and Clinical Impact of Natera’s Oncology Platform
data.description: Natera, Inc., a prominent player in cell-free DNA and precision medicine (NASDAQ: NTRA), shared that at the 2026 American Association for Cancer Research (AACR) Annual Meeting in San Diego, CA, they will present 20 abstracts. This includes two oral presentations showcasing data from their technologies. The collaboration with esteemed academic and clinical partners has allowed for a diverse range of tumor types to be covered in these presentations. The event is scheduled from April 17 to April 22.

data.title: Finite State Appoints AI Security Marketing Veteran Ann Miller as Vice President of Marketing
data.description: In Columbus, Ohio, Finite State, a renowned company specializing in product security and software supply chain risk management, has appointed Ann Miller as the Vice President of Marketing. With over 15 years of experience in accelerating high-growth technology firms, Miller is skilled in cybersecurity and AI-based platforms, adept at transforming new technologies into industry benchmarks. Her arrival at Finite State is significant as companies grapple with rising challenges in the sector.

data.title: Alloy Therapeutics Enters into Multi-Target Collaboration and License Agreement with Biogen for Use of Alloy’s AntiClastic™ ASO Platform
data.description: Alloy Therapeutics Inc. has recently revealed a partnership with Biogen Inc., where Biogen will leverage Alloy's AntiClastic™ ASO Platform to develop antisense therapeutics for various undisclosed targets. Alloy will be compensated with an initial payment and stands to earn additional milestones and royalties based on the success of the collaboration. This move signifies Alloy's commitment to making cutting-edge drug discovery technologies more accessible within the biotechnology industry.
